title: helichrysum drummondii
intro: Helichrysum drummondii, also known as Drummond's Everlasting, is a perennial flowering plant native to Western Australia. Its leaves and flowers have been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to their anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which can help soothe wounds, reduce pain, and fight off infections. The health benefits of Helichrysum drummondii include its ability to alleviate symptoms of arthritis, improve circulation, and support digestive health. Helichrysum drummondii can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or essential oil, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
